pageContext.name: Vecna
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the Vecna Vinyl Collectible.  It's time. Vecna from Netflix's Stranger Things Season 4 has crossed over from the Upside Down and is ready to show his destructive powers.  Featuring the iconic grandfather clock and the hive mind of intertwined vines, this vinyl collectible captures much that we love (and fear) from the incredible season.  As Vecna extends an evil arm, look out for a secret detail hidden on his wrist… See you on the other side with Stranger Things x Mighty Jaxx: Vecna!
